components.dashboard_grid: Bento-style grid for rooms. Use a 2-column layout for rooms 101-106, and make 107 full-width or centered. Each card must visibly show the room number, AC/Non-AC status, and Available/Occupied state.
components.room_card_available: Clean white background, soft shadow. Features a green 'Available' chip, large typography for room number, and an embedded 'Book' CTA icon or button.
components.room_card_occupied: Tinted background (e.g., #FDF7F5). Features a red 'Occupied' chip, displays the Guest Name and checkout time. 'Checkout' button should be accessible.
components.booking_flow: Use a clean scrollable form (ScrollView + KeyboardAvoidingView). Inputs should be large and thumb-friendly. The rate editor should show the base price with a tactile, distinct '+₹100' pill button next to it for quick increments.
components.photo_upload: Two side-by-side square or 4:3 touchable dropzones for 'Aadhar Front' and 'Aadhar Back'. Dashed borders with a subtle primary-tinted background and a camera icon.
components.bottom_tabs: Floating pill-shaped tab bar or a clean bottom-anchored tab bar. Active tab icon should be primary color, inactive should be text_muted.
components.inputs: Filled or outlined inputs with generous padding. Highlight border in primary color on focus.

image_urls.description: Elegant reception bell, use as a subtle blurred background for the login screen to establish a premium hospitality feel.
Modern double bed hotel room with warm lighting. Use as a header or thumbnail for AC room details.
Cozy room with warm lighting. Use as a header or thumbnail for Non-AC room details.
Indian traditional abstract stone carving pattern, use sparingly for top header backgrounds or empty states.

technical_instructions.file_structure: Ensure all files are created as .js files (not .tsx).
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) MUST include a 'testID' attribute (e.g., testID='login-submit-button') for React Native testing.
technical_instructions.routing: Use expo-router file-based routing. Implement tabs for Dashboard, Bookings, Search, and Settings.
technical_instructions.ui_primitives: Use React Native components (<View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, <TouchableOpacity>). Do not use HTML web elements. Map the JSON color palette to standard RN StyleSheet or Tailwind via NativeWind.
